case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. RAJWANT SEKHOW et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SEKHOW, RAJWANT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEKHOW, RAJWANT $2,649.49 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,949.49, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-12-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
